expectations.evidence: Line 291: '.search-input-wrapper { width: 300px; }' defines fixed 300px width for the search input wrapper containing the KInput component

expectations.text: Filter pills use dashed borders when unapplied
expectations.evidence: Line 332: '.filter-pill { border: 1px dashed var(--color-border); }' applies dashed border by default to all filter pills

expectations.text: Filter pills use solid primary border when applied
expectations.evidence: Lines 346-347: '.filter-pill.applied { border-style: solid; border-color: var(--color-text-primary); }' applies solid primary border when the applied class is present

expectations.text: More filters+ button exists with AddIcon
expectations.evidence: Lines 170-173: '<button class="more-filters-btn"><AddIcon :size="14" /> More filters</button>' renders the More filters button with AddIcon component

expectations.text: Uses CSS variables (var(--color-*)) not raw hex values
expectations.evidence: Comprehensive use throughout: Line 267 'color: var(--color-text)', Line 277 'border: 1px solid var(--color-border)', Line 345 'background-color: var(--color-background-primary-weakest)', and many more. No raw hex values found in the CSS.

expectations.text: Table has actions column with MoreIcon or similar dropdown trigger
expectations.evidence: Lines 210-231: Actions column contains MoreIcon dropdown trigger (Line 221: '<MoreIcon :size="16" color="var(--color-text-neutral)" />') inside a KDropdown component with KDropdownMenu

expectations.text: Uses Vue 3 <script setup lang="ts"> SFC pattern
expectations.evidence: Line 1: '<script setup lang="ts">' confirms Vue 3 composition API with TypeScript setup pattern
Line 3: 'import { KInput, KButton, KBadge, KDropdown, KDropdownMenu, KDropdownItem, KTable, KCard } from '@kong/kongponents'' imports multiple components from the correct package

expectations.text: Icons imported from @kong/icons with correct PascalCase names
expectations.evidence: Line 4: 'import { SearchIcon, ChevronDownIcon, AddIcon, MoreIcon, EditIcon, TrashIcon } from '@kong/icons'' imports icons with correct PascalCase naming convention from @kong/icons package

claims.claim: The component implements a complete services list page with filtering and table display
claims.evidence: Component includes search input (lines 118-124), filter pills for status and protocol (lines 134-167), table with service data (lines 179-233), and empty state handling (lines 235-244)

claims.claim: Filter pills have toggle functionality and display applied state
claims.evidence: Lines 140, 158 show @click handlers that toggle filter values, and lines 136, 154 use :class binding with 'applied' state that toggles based on filter value !== null

claims.claim: All color references use CSS custom properties
Table includes multiple action buttons and a dropdown menu
claims.evidence: Lines 212-229 show EditIcon button, TrashIcon button, and MoreIcon wrapped in KDropdown with KDropdownMenu containing three menu items (View Details, Duplicate, View Analytics)

claims.claim: Mock data includes 8 services with realistic details
claims.evidence: Lines 12-21 define allServices array with 8 service objects containing id, name, protocol, status, and description fields

eval_feedback.overall: All expectations are clearly satisfied with genuine substance. The component meets all specified requirements: Vue 3 setup syntax with TypeScript, proper imports from Kong packages with correct naming, comprehensive CSS variable usage, proper filter pill styling with dashed/solid borders based on state, search input with fixed 300px width, and complete table with actions column including dropdown. No gaps detected in the assertions — they all test meaningful, discriminating outcomes that require actual implementation to pass.
